CustomField.description: How the most recent 19+ age attestation was captured. Public Sign-up Form = self-attested via the FIMBY Sign Up flow on /sign-up. Login Flow = self-attested via the TOS reacceptance modal at next login (combined TOS + age checkbox in fimbyTosFlowScreen). Support Relationship Paper Form = signed by the supportee on the printed FimbyAuthorizedSupporterForm and stamped at relationship approval. Admin Backfill = recorded by a privileged admin (document the basis in the Contact record history).
CustomField.label: Age Attestation Source
